message:
refactor(codegen): Replace inline type checks with trait functions (batch 4)

Continue systematic refactoring to use centralized trait functions:
- arithmetic.zig: Use container_traits.isList/isArray and type_traits.isIntegral/isFloating
- collections.zig: Use type_traits.isFloating/isIntegral for int/float checks
- expressions.zig: Use type_traits.isIntegral for cond_type == .int or .usize
- float_conv.zig: Use string_traits.isString for local type check
- for_basic.zig: Use type_traits.isIntegral for first_elem_type check
- assign_defer.zig: Use type_traits.isIntegral/isFloating for int/float mix check
- value_generation.zig: Use type_traits.isIntegral for is_int check
